Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration, Petition To Compel Arbitration And In The Alternative Stay Action
Off Calendar May-12-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE AND REHAB INC.'s Petition To Compel Arbitration And In The Alternative, to Stay Action is granted. In AT&T Mobility LLC v. Concepcion, the US Supreme Court held that a state cannot "prohibit[] outright the arbitration of a particular type of claim" because the Federal Arbitration Act preempts the conflicting state rule. ((2010) 131 S.Ct. 1740, 1747.) Therefore, the court declines to deny compelling arbitration of the PAGA cause of action, even though the issue is currently being reviewed by the California Supreme Court. Order signed. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sandy Carranza #7062.
